allowed_work: read the frozen P5 arrays and metadata
fit scalar calibrations on train only
write the tracked Gate 1 table, summary, closeout, and fixture results
prohibited_work: modify model, loss, or training configuration
train or evaluate a learned model
generate data or relabel P5 samples
write data/, output/, checkpoints/, or logs/

p0_backward_traceability.note: Gate 1 retains P0 files unchanged and introduces operator-consistent P_operator explicitly.

operator_semantics.bottom_mask: coords[:,2] == min(coords[:,2]); cross-check bc_features is_bottom and sample_meta bottom boundary indices
operator_semantics.operator_reason: _assemble_triplets replaces every bottom Dirichlet row with T=T_bottom before adding q*CV; _source_power_total iterates iz=1..end

target_scale.name: s_y
target_scale.reason: CV-weighted RMS DeltaT is non-negative and retains both source-driven and BC-driven amplitude.

candidates.constant: unit raw base; train-only log-space constant calibration
candidates.legacy_p_array_r_series: P_array * (1/(top_h*A) + Lz/(A*harmonic_kz)); retained exactly as the P0-style legacy comparator
candidates.source_centroid_two_path: P_operator times the parallel equivalent of centroid-to-bottom and centroid-to-top-plus-Robin paths
candidates.z_collapsed_1d: CV-collapsed z-only finite-volume thermal network with bottom Dirichlet, top Robin, P_operator source, and T_inf-T_bottom offset

calibration_and_selection.test_role_policy: report_only_after_selection; never used to fit calibration, select a candidate, set a threshold, or choose a formula
calibration_and_selection.calibration: log(s_y) = intercept + slope * log(raw_proxy), fitted only on train; constant uses intercept only
calibration_and_selection.physics_decision_gate: best physical candidate must have paired-bootstrap valid_iid log-RMSE delta versus constant with 95% upper bound below 0; otherwise reject all single deterministic proxies and require a learned global scale in a later gate
